gov010_check: waived:Presentation-only dedicated rollout slice; FIB-H/FIB-S serve as scaffold + mechanism authority; frozen ADRs ADR-052-ADR-055
fib_s_amendments: CAP-1A added (props contract freeze) — amended WS1 traces_to and gate criteria
CAP-8 enhanced with semantic spot-check matrix (RULE-10) and per-authority sentinel (RULE-11)

patches: Patch 1 — Derived authority degradation: D5 hierarchy (Actual>Observed>Estimated) must be computed and displayed visibly when derivedFrom present; Derived without visible degraded label = non-conformant. Applied to props contract block, WS1 impl, WS1 AC.
Patch 2 — Source visibility lock: value.source MUST render as visible non-truncated text; tooltip-only/icon-only/truncated = non-conformant. Applied to props contract block, WS1 impl, WS1 AC.
Patch 3 — Pattern A vs Pattern B rule: Pattern A default when multiple authority classes co-present; Pattern B requires explicit derivedFrom. Applied to props contract block, WS1 impl, WS1 AC.
Patch 4 — Caller migration hardening (WS5): buy-in-threshold-indicator callers must be enumerated via grep and listed in implementation notes; zero tolerance for partial migration. Applied to WS5 AC.

Patch 5 — Sentinel table strengthened (WS8): authority-class sentinel table now requires recording UI value + service/API reference value + comparison result per row; label-only validation = non-conformant.
Patch 6 — Walkthrough formalized (WS8): replaced free-form bullet checklist with per-surface table (13 rows × 4 Y/N columns); all cells must be Y before WS8 complete.

Patch 7 — Source truncation guard: responsive/compact layouts must not hide or truncate authority/source labels; CSS overflow-hidden/ellipsis on authority badge or source label = non-conformant. Applied to props contract block, WS1 impl, WS1 AC.

ws4_direction.approach: Phase 1.3-compliant string-level authority labeling. No fake envelopes, no DTO changes, no prop type changes.
implementation_notes: summary-band.tsx line 136 netWinLoss primaryValue: CONTROLLED BOUNDARY — bare string permitted at hero position; title+category provide implicit authority context
start-from-previous.tsx: NO-ACTION — already FinancialValue envelopes from Phase 1.2B-B
